easy: Blue wings dance under the moon.
Ri looks at the quiet ocean.
Bright moonlight warms the dark sea.
medium: An azure swallowtail fluttered across the evening tide.
The glowing crescent moon beautifully illuminated the water.
Ri gently caught a fragile, pale blue insect.
hard: A sapphire morpho's erratic flight-braving turbulent ocean winds-fascinated Ri immensely.
Illuminated by otherworldly moonlight, the restless sea mirrored a glowing lunar orb.
Seldom had onlookers witnessed such pristine, skyblue wings navigating the midnight deep.
